auth.label: API Key
auth.description: NinjaPear API key used with the Authorization Bearer header. Get it from the API section in the NinjaPear dashboard: https://nubela.co/dashboard.

actions.name: check_disposable_email
actions.description: Check whether an email address is disposable or from a free email provider.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for checking an email address.

email.description: The email address that was checked.

is_disposable_email.description: Whether the email domain is a known disposable provider.

is_free_email.description: Whether the email domain is a free email provider.

outputSchema.description: The email classification returned by NinjaPear.

actions.name: get_company_details
actions.description: Retrieve detailed company information such as description, industry, leadership, and addresses.

website.description: The website URL or company name of the target company. A website URL is recommended for precision.

include_employee_count.description: Whether to include fresh employee count data.

follower_count.description: Whether to include X follower and following counts.

use_cache.description: How NinjaPear should use cached enrichment data.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving company details.

outputSchema.description: Detailed company information returned by NinjaPear.

actions.name: get_credit_balance
actions.description: Get the current NinjaPear credit balance for the authenticated account.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for getting the NinjaPear credit balance.

actions.name: get_employee_count
actions.description: Get the estimated employee count for a company.

website.description: The website URL or company name of the target company. A website URL is recommended for precision.

use_cache.description: How NinjaPear should use cached enrichment data.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for getting a company employee count.

outputSchema.description: Employee count data returned by NinjaPear.

actions.name: list_competitors
actions.description: Discover direct business competitors of a target company.

website.description: The website URL or company name of the target company. A website URL is recommended for precision.

use_cache.description: How NinjaPear should use cached enrichment data.

company_details_url.description: URL to the NinjaPear Company Details API for this competitor.

competition_reason.description: Why this company is considered a competitor.

items.description: A competitor returned by NinjaPear competitor listing.

actions.name: list_customers
actions.description: List likely customers, investors, and partner platforms for a target company.

website.description: The website URL or company name of the target company. A website URL is recommended for precision.

page_size.description: Number of results per page, from 1 to 200.

quality_filter.description: Whether to filter out low-quality results.

use_cache.description: How NinjaPear should use cached enrichment data.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing likely customers and partners.

items.description: A company returned by NinjaPear customer listing.

customers.description: Companies that are probable customers of the target company.

items.description: A company returned by NinjaPear customer listing.

investors.description: Investors that have invested in the target company.

items.description: A company returned by NinjaPear customer listing.

partner_platforms.description: Partners, platforms, or service providers used by the target company.

anyOf.description: Pagination URL for the next page of results.

actions.name: list_products
actions.description: List products and services offered by a target company.

website.description: The website URL or company name of the target company. A website URL is recommended for precision.

use_cache.description: How NinjaPear should use cached enrichment data.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing products and services.

items.description: A product or service returned by NinjaPear.

products.description: Products and services offered by the target company.

credit_cost.description: Total credits charged for this call.

anyOf.description: Error message when a streamed live response could not return products.

actions.name: lookup_company_website
actions.description: Resolve a company name to its canonical website URL.

company_name.description: The company name to look up.

country_code.description: Optional ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code used to bias the search.

hint.description: Hint used to differentiate similarly named companies.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for resolving a company website.

outputSchema.description: The resolved company website returned by NinjaPear.
